title: Migration Mapping: {Entity Name}
description: Column-level mapping document for {source_table} to {dv_entity} migration

sections.name: Entity Summary
sections.description: Source table, target entity, pipeline, alternate key, upsert behavior

criteria.description: Summary table with Source Table, Target DV Entity, Pipeline, Alternate Key, Upsert Behavior

sections.name: Column Mapping
sections.description: Every source column mapped to its target DV attribute with transform details

criteria.description: Column mapping table with full source-to-sink trace for every column
Every source column appears in the mapping, either mapped to a DV attribute or listed as unmapped with explanation
Transform column documents the full lineage — not just 'Direct' but the staging table and any SQL logic involved (JOINs, CASE, string functions, COALESCE)

sections.name: Transform Details
sections.description: Expanded documentation for complex transforms (CTEs, multi-table JOINs, CASE statements, computed columns)

criteria.description: Each complex transform has its own subsection with the full SQL logic explained in plain language

sections.name: Lookup Dependencies
sections.description: Reference data required during transform, with source and join logic

criteria.description: Lookup dependency table showing what reference data is needed and how it is joined

sections.name: Unmapped Columns
sections.description: Source columns not migrated to the target system

criteria.description: Every unmapped source column listed with a reason for exclusion

sections.name: Data Quality Notes
sections.description: Truncation risks, null handling, enum mappings, encoding cleanup

criteria.description: Documents known data quality issues: truncation, nulls, invalid values, encoding, and how each is handled

gather.description: Pipeline JSON — Copy activity source queries, sink config, alternate keys
Staging table DDL — column names and types in Azure SQL
Dataverse entity schema — target attributes, types, relationships
Stored procedure — transform SQL if SP-based
